CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-17-2016 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-28-2016 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Nov-29-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or Summary Adjudication Of Issues
Off Calendar Sep-06-2016 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:

Attorney Michael Thomas for Defendants Kevin Kramer and Kevin Salay the moving party.
Attorney Vladislav P. Viltman for Plaintiff Kimberly Chambers the opposing party.

After hearing arguments from both parties in the matter of DEFENDANTS KEVIN KRAMER, KAREN SALAY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or Summary Adjudication Of Issues. The Court takes this matter under submission. Judge Angela Bradstreet, Clerk J. Rumsey, Not Reported. (501)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-02-2015 Set For Trial On Apr-25-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-13-2016 Continued To Oct-03-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-14-2016 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave Of Court To File First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Feb-16-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Brian Soriano, (415)593-7333 for Plaintiff/Moving party Kimberley Chambers.

Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF KIMBERLEY CHAMBERS Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave Of Court To File First Amended Complaint is GRANTED. No opposition filed. First Amended Complaint shall be filed forthwith. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendant Responses To First Set Of Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, Requests For Production Of Documents, Requests For Admissions And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant
Off Calendar Oct-06-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: PLAINTIFF KIMBERLEY CHAMBERS' Motion To Compel Defendant Responses To First Set Of Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, Requests For Production Of Documents, Requests For Admissions And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant is GRANTED, no opposition filed. Admissions are deemed admitted. Responses to Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories and Requests for Production without objections shall be served on Plaintiff within 10 days of notice of entry of order. Sanctions granted in the amount of $1,350. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not Reported, D501.
